data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Critical data is protected through encryption protocols during transmission.
data.technical_spec: Employs TLS 1.2 or 1.3 for data in transit.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Follows industry standards for security assessments and penetration testing.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: In place to mitigate potential Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes services like Cloudflare or AWS Shield.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Uses robust IAM protocols to manage user access and permissions.
data.technical_spec: Implements multifactor authentication and least privilege principle.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Has a structured response plan to handle security incidents efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Includes detailed procedures for detection, containment, eradication, and recovery.
